bdc7c4975a4d.title: Get your menu online — 77% of diners check before visiting
bdc7c4975a4d.description: No online menu found. Most diners check the menu before committing. Without one, you lose the customer at the decision point.
bdc7c4975a4d.management_implication: Every day without a menu is a percentage of potential customers lost.

97b956510fd3.title: Close the hygiene gap — 3 to 5
97b956510fd3.description: An FSA rating of 3 is visible on your Google listing and the FSA website. Customers see it before they see your menu. Address the inspector's specific findings.
97b956510fd3.expected_upside: Remove the trust ceiling on your overall score

5efeda3c8606.title: Establish basic web presence — you don't exist online beyond Google
5efeda3c8606.description: No website, Facebook, or Instagram detected. Even a basic page improves discoverability and gives customers a reason to trust you before visiting.

d54645dd84ea.title: Ranked #2 of 2 locally — peers are ahead
d54645dd84ea.description: At percentile 0.0, customers in this area have higher-rated alternatives. This isn't a crisis but it means you're competing on convenience rather than reputation.

d6bb31ca9b90.title: Guest experience trailing — investigate what peers do differently
d6bb31ca9b90.description: You trail peers by 1.7 points on experience. This isn't a label problem — it means customers are getting a measurably better experience on this dimension from your competitors.

883e0d93def2.title: Compliance record weakest in peer set — creates inspection exposure
883e0d93def2.description: You trail peers by 4.0 points on trust. This isn't a label problem — it means customers are getting a measurably better experience on this dimension from your competitors.

de09b6869806.title: Harder to book/find than competitors — friction losing customers
de09b6869806.description: You trail peers by 1.5 points on conversion. This isn't a label problem — it means customers are getting a measurably better experience on this dimension from your competitors.
